title: Fun Time Gerry the Stacking Giraffe
features: Complies with UK & EU Safety legislation
description: Great times ahead, with the Funtime Gerry stacking Giraffe. Made from safe durable plastic, it is the perfect toy for your little one with seven rainbow multi coloured rings that you can stack and sort. This toy invites young learners to develop colour, shape recognition, matching skills and eye-hand coordination. Each ring has a different texture to it, and so it helps your child to develop sensory perception. Once you have built stacked and sorted Gerry, he converts to a rocking stacking pile up. Suitable for 12 months & up.
